issues.message: Form control is missing an accessible label

evidence.description: Found unlabeled <input> control with type="text" and name="student_name".

issues.suggested_fix: Add a visible <label> connected with for/id. Use aria-label only when a visible label is not possible.

issues.message: Form control is missing an accessible label

evidence.description: Found unlabeled <textarea> control with type="text" and name="accommodation_request".

issues.suggested_fix: Add a visible <label> connected with for/id. Use aria-label only when a visible label is not possible.

evidence.description: Found generic link text "click here" for href "/scholarships/help".

issues.suggested_fix: Use descriptive link text like "Download scholarship guidelines" instead of "click here."

issues.message: Button is missing an accessible name

evidence.description: Found a <button> without visible text, aria-label, title, or image alt text.

issues.suggested_fix: Add clear button text or an aria-label that describes the button action.

issues.message: Image is missing useful alt text

evidence.description: Found without useful alt text.

issues.suggested_fix: Add alt text that describes the image purpose, or mark decorative images as presentation.

evidence.description: Heading "Application Details" jumps from h1 to h3.

issues.suggested_fix: Do not skip heading levels; move from h1 to h2 before h3.

evidence.description: Found a <video> element without a captions or subtitles track.

issues.suggested_fix: Add captions or subtitles for education video content.

limitations: This prototype only runs static HTML checks.
It does not replace a full human accessibility audit.

likely_blockers.message: Form control is missing an accessible label
likely_blockers.task_impact: Form control may be hard to understand or complete because it has no accessible label.

likely_blockers.message: Form control is missing an accessible label
likely_blockers.task_impact: Form control may be hard to understand or complete because it has no accessible label.
Link text may not clearly explain the destination or action.

likely_blockers.message: Button is missing an accessible name
likely_blockers.task_impact: Student may not be able to identify what an unlabeled button does.
Student may struggle to understand the page structure and task sections.
